titleStmt.title: SII 31.207: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 207. (A.R. No. B 293 of 1936.) MADDIKEṞA, PATTIKONDA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in the roof of the ruined temple of Vīrabhadra in front of the house of Jamēdār Timmappa Nāyuḍu.
It is dated in Śaka 1484, Duṁdubhi, Māgha, ba. 14 corresponding to 1563 A.D. Feruary, 21, Sunday.

Damaged. Registers the gift of two vaillage Maddikera and Timmapuram, an agrahāra attached to Maddikera by Ajātivīraśaiva Sidhabhikshāvṛitti-Ayyavāru for worship and offering during the festival of Kārttīka to the god Vīrabhadra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1484 nēṁṭi du
ṁdubhi saṁvatsara māṣu ba 14 lu śrīsvayaṁbhū śrīliṁgga cakra
vartiśrīparvataṁ śrīmallikārjusa mahāliṁggadēvuni divya
śrīpādapadmārādhakulaina śrīkailāsaṁmīdidēvā(pa)pu(pri)
dhivī mahaṁttu mukhyamayina Ajātivīraśaiva siddhabhikṣāvritti A
yyavāru śivarātri puṁṇyakālamaṁdu śrīmallikājuna ma
hāliṁgadēvuni saṁnidhini siṁhāsanārūḍhulai vuṁḍi maddikera śrīvī
rabhadradēvuniki kārttika pūjanaivēdyālaku maddikera maddikeraku cellē
baṁḍa polamaina tiṁmmāpuraṁ Aneḍi Agrahāraṁ sahāgānu grā
mālu 2 yivē Akṣarālānu grāmālu reṁḍu yīreṁḍu grāmālānū
yiccina maddikera grāma suṁkālu 12 Ayinaṭi
timmāpuraṁ rokhaṁ vaḍlu
lānu nelā
dēva Apacāraṁ
ṁgā niccina dharmmaśāsanaṁ .
liṁ rppitaṁ śrīgiri liṁgaṁ . yī śāsanaṁ
grāmaṁlō liṁga ravīra
vārikulācāra śivācāranaku veri . Ani vēsina darmaśāsanaṁ
Digital edition of SII 31.207 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
